articles.title: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普再次威胁袭击伊朗桥梁及发电厂
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Renews Threat of Attacks on Bridges and Power Plants
articles.summary: 在特朗普设定的周二截止日期来临前，特朗普与伊朗方面传出矛盾信号。周二早些时候，以色列称检测到从伊朗发射的导弹，伊朗红新月会表示，伊朗首都德黑兰的一处居民区已遭空袭击中。
articles.summary_original: President Trump and Iran sent mixed messages ahead of his Tuesday deadline. Early Tuesday, Israel said it had detected missiles launching from Iran and the Iranian Red Crescent Society said a residential area of Tehran had been hit in an airstrike.

articles.title: 石油冲击推动菲律宾通胀飙升至20个月新高
articles.title_original: Oil Shock Sends Philippine Inflation Surging to 20-Month High
articles.summary: 菲律宾3月通货膨胀率大幅飙升，创下20个月来新高。此次通胀上涨源于石油供给冲击，伊朗战事导致全球能源供应受阻，燃油价格被推高，最终带动菲律宾整体通胀升至近两年高位。
articles.summary_original: The Philippines’ inflation spiked in March to the highest in nearly two years as the Iran war choked energy supply and pushed up fuel prices.

articles.title: 伊朗对美下通牒 称只接受一种终战局面 - 央广网
articles.summary: 多家媒体报道，伊朗就对美相关争端发出强硬通牒，明确表示只接受一种终战局面。伊朗多位高层批评美国前总统特朗普的鲁莽举动与战争性言论，称其失言彻底揭露美国真实面目，回应言辞十分激烈。

articles.title: 美国外交关系协会埃弗斯：美伊远未达成协议
articles.title_original: CFR's Ewers: US and Iran Far From a Deal
articles.summary: 美国外交关系协会中东研究高级研究员伊丽莎·埃弗斯，做客彭博社《亚洲贸易》节目探讨伊朗局势最新进展。美国总统特朗普坚持，霍尔木兹海峡航行自由必须纳入任何美伊相关协议，本信息来源于彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Elisa Ewers, Senior Fellow for Middle East Studies at the Council on Foreign Relations, discusses the latest developments on the Iran war as President Trump insisted that freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz be part of any deal. She speaks with Paul Allen and Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 特朗普威胁摧毁伊朗目标 要求霍尔木兹海峡开放
articles.title_original: Trump Threatens Destruction in Iran, Demands Hormuz Open
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普坚持，任何相关协议都必须保障霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由，同时他升级了对伊朗的威胁，放言将摧毁伊朗核心基础设施。该消息由彭博社记者劳拉·戴维森报道，信源为彭博社。
articles.summary_original: President Donald Trump has insisted that freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz be part of any deal and escalated threats to obliterate key Iranian infrastructure. Bloomberg's Laura Davison reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 【8点见】安徽6岁失联女童确认遇害 - 央视网
articles.summary: 安徽安庆一名6岁失联女童已确认遇害，涉案35岁女性犯罪嫌疑人柳某某已被抓获归案。该女童此前于事发地拐角处失踪，事发地周边有大片田地，失联经过曾引发关注，当地相关工作人员正持续安抚女童家属情绪。

articles.title: 8点1氪丨胖东来再回应“鸡蛋被检出角黄素”；苹果首款折叠屏手机已在试产；2026清明档电影票房已破2.8亿元
articles.summary: 近期多个热点引发关注：CBA球员郭艾伦疑遭熟人以投资为名诈骗近千万元，已报案立案；苹果首款折叠屏iPhone已进入试产，预计2026下半年推出；胖东来送检涉角黄素争议的鸡蛋结果全部合格；2026清明档电影票房破2.8亿元，清明假期跨区域流动预计达8.4亿人次。

articles.title: 特朗普霍尔木兹最后通牒将到期 暂无迹象显示伊朗接受
articles.title_original: Trump's Hormuz ultimatum nears - with little indication Iran is on board
articles.summary: 美国要求伊朗开放霍尔木兹海峡的最后通牒将于周二到期，目前已进入倒计时阶段。美国总统特朗普当前处于微妙的政治处境，伊朗方面尚未表现出接受美方要求的明显迹象。
articles.summary_original: The US president is in a delicate political position as the final hours to Tuesday's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz tick down.

articles.title: 人民币或因抗伊冲击韧性及经济支撑避开季节性下跌
articles.title_original: Yuan May Dodge Seasonal Slump on Iran War Resilience, Economy
articles.summary: 中国对伊朗冲突带来的经济冲击具备较强抵御韧性，国内经济复苏态势也持续向好，在此支撑下，人民币有望打破以往第二季度通常会出现下跌的季节性规律，避开本次季节性下滑。
articles.summary_original: China’s resilience to the economic impact of the Iran war and a burgeoning domestic recovery offer the potential for the yuan to break out of a seasonal pattern for losses in the second quarter.

articles.title: 市场综述：伊朗最后期限引关注 股市油价震荡拉锯
articles.title_original: Stocks, Oil Whipsaw With Iran Deadline in Focus: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: 特朗普对伊朗的最新期限临近，市场受不确定性影响，股市与原油价格维持窄幅波动。目前虽传出初步停火信号，但局势仍存在进一步升级的风险，整体市场交投偏谨慎。
articles.summary_original: Stocks and crude oil traded in narrow ranges amid uncertainty ahead of President Donald Trump’s latest Iran deadline, with tentative ceasefire signals tempered by the risk of further escalation.

articles.title: 特朗普威胁若伊朗不开放霍尔木兹海峡将打击民用目标
articles.title_original: Trump Threatens to Hit Civilian Targets If Iran Doesn’t Open Hormuz
articles.summary: 今日推出的《Big Take》播客围绕伊朗相关局势展开深度梳理，内容涵盖特朗普针对伊朗的矛盾表态、当前伊朗相关停火谈判的实际进展状况，同时也会分析特朗普提出要对霍尔木兹海峡征收通行费的缘由。
articles.summary_original: On today’s Big Take podcast: Unpacking President Trump’s mixed rhetoric on Iran, the status of ceasefire talks and why he wants to collect tolls for the strait.

articles.title: 百事取消对坎耶·韦斯特领衔的无线音乐节的赞助
articles.title_original: Pepsi Drops Sponsorship of Wireless Festival Headlined by Kanye West
articles.summary: 曾发表反犹太主义及种族主义言论的说唱歌手坎耶·韦斯特，受邀担任无线音乐节领衔表演者。英国首相基尔·斯塔默对此事表示“深感担忧”，百事随后宣布取消对该音乐节的赞助。
articles.summary_original: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he was “deeply concerned” that the rapper known for antisemitic and racist comments had been booked to perform at the Wireless Festival.

articles.title: 交易商权衡特朗普对伊动武最后期限 金价持稳
articles.title_original: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Trump’s Deadline to Strike Iran
articles.summary: 当前金价在经历两日连续下跌后回归持稳态势，交易商正评估美国总统特朗普最新发出的摧毁伊朗基础设施的威胁，以及长期战争可能对通胀和经济增长带来的潜在冲击。
articles.summary_original: Gold steadied after a two-day decline, as traders weighed US President Donald Trump’s latest threat to destroy Iranian infrastructure and the impact of a protracted war on inflation and economic growth.

articles.title: 新爆料重燃阿根廷总统米莱牵涉的加密货币丑闻
articles.title_original: New Revelations Reignite Crypto Scandal Involving Argentina’s President Milei
articles.summary: 阿根廷总统米莱曾公开表示，自己与Libra加密货币的发行不存在关联。最新曝光的法庭文件对米莱的这一表态提出了质疑，相关新爆料也让这桩牵涉米莱的加密货币丑闻再度引发关注。
articles.summary_original: Court documents raise questions about the Argentine president’s statements that he had no connection to the launch of the $Libra cryptocurrency.

articles.title: 天津向海谋兴激活“蓝色引擎”（“十五五”开好局起好步） - 人民网财经
articles.summary: “十五五”开局起步阶段，天津立足自身滨海区位优势，坚持向海谋兴发展方向，发力培育海洋经济发展新动能，激活带动城市高质量发展的“蓝色引擎”，相关内容刊发于人民网财经。

articles.title: 最后期限前夕特朗普升级对伊威胁 油价持稳
articles.title_original: Oil Steadies as Trump’s Iran Threats Escalate Before Deadline
articles.summary: 周二对伊要求最后期限前夕，美国总统特朗普升级对伊朗威胁，称若伊朗未能满足其要求，将摧毁伊朗境内的关键基础设施。受此影响，国际油价未出现大幅波动，整体变动很小，走势保持平稳。
articles.summary_original: Oil was little changed as President Donald Trump escalated threats to obliterate key Iranian infrastructure if his terms aren’t met before a Tuesday deadline.

articles.title: 特朗普自称商人 要掌控伊朗石油 再次威胁要摧毁伊朗民用设施 - 中国日报网
articles.summary: 特朗普就伊朗问题发声，自称商人，称要掌控伊朗石油，提出应收取霍尔木兹海峡通行费；他给伊朗设定的7日最终停战期限不可更改，再次威胁要摧毁伊朗民用设施，发言措辞极端脏话连篇，遭外界批评精神错乱，此番发声推高原油价格直线拉升。

articles.title: One-Dyas在北海受保护海域扩大天然气产量
articles.title_original: One-Dyas Expands Gas Output in Protected North Sea Marine Zone
articles.summary: 能源企业One-Dyas BV已启动其北海平台第二口井的生产作业，本次产能扩张位于北海受保护海洋区域内，完成投产扩产后，该站点的天然气年产量已提升至约10亿立方米。
articles.summary_original: One-Dyas BV has started production from a second well at its platform in the North Sea, lifting annual output at the site to about 1 billion cubic meters of gas.

articles.title: 特朗普威胁若截止日前未达成协议 将一夜击溃伊朗
articles.title_original: Trump threatens to take out Iran in 'one night' if no deal before deadline
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普就霍尔木兹海峡问题为伊朗设定周二截止期限，要求伊朗重新开放这一全球关键能源航道，特朗普威胁称，若伊朗在期限前未能达成相关协议，美国将在一夜之间击溃伊朗。
articles.summary_original: The US president wants Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global energy route, before his Tuesday deadline.

articles.title: OpenAI前员工通过新基金悄悄投资，基金规模或达1亿美元
articles.title_original: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
articles.summary: 一家与OpenAI渊源深厚的全新风险投资基金Zero Shot，正在募集旗下首只基金，目标募集规模为1亿美元，目前该基金已经完成多笔投资，相关投资动作低调推进。
articles.summary_original: Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

articles.title: OpenAI校友成立新基金悄悄投资 基金规模或达1亿美元
articles.title_original: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
articles.summary: 一家与OpenAI渊源深厚的新风险投资机构Zero Shot，由OpenAI校友发起设立，目前正为旗下首只基金募资，目标总规模达到1亿美元，该机构已经低调出手，完成了多笔投资布局。
articles.summary_original: Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

articles.title: 威斯康星州州长否决色情网站年龄核查法案
articles.title_original: Wisconsin governor says ‘no’ to age checks for porn
articles.summary: 据404 Media此前报道，美国威斯康星州州长托尼·埃弗斯否决了一项要求民众访问色情网站前必须验证年龄的法案。埃弗斯上周致函州议会成员称，该法案会给访问受宪法保护材料的成年人强加侵扰性负担。
articles.summary_original: Wisconsin Gov. Tony Evers vetoed a bill that would've required residents to verify their age before accessing porn sites, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a letter to the members of the assembly last week, Evers writes that the bill "imposes an intrusive burden on adults who are trying to access constitutionally protected materials." […]

articles.title: 美国飞行员在伊朗偏远地区的营救行动如何展开
articles.title_original: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
articles.summary: 此次营救行动在伊朗偏远的敌对区域开展，行动目标是将受困于地下的美国飞行员安全救出，整个营救流程高度复杂，需要多主体协同推进，最终共有多个不同的美国政府机构参与了本次行动。
articles.summary_original: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

articles.title: 印度九名警察因新冠疫情期间羁押杀人被判死刑
articles.title_original: Nine policemen sentenced to death in India over Covid custody killings
articles.summary: 2020年印度新冠疫情封锁管控期间，一对父子因涉嫌违反封锁规定被警方逮捕，随后二人在羁押中死亡。日前这起案件作出判决，涉案的九名警察被依法判处死刑。
articles.summary_original: The father and son died in jail after being arrested on suspicion of breaching Covid lockdown rules in 2020.

articles.title: 油价并非推动二手电动汽车销量增长的唯一因素
articles.title_original: Gas prices aren’t the only factor fueling used EV sales
articles.summary: 最新公布的电动汽车销量数据表现分化，新车市场行情惨淡、走势低迷，而二手电动汽车的市场走势与新车截然相反，呈现出逆势上行的态势，除油价外，还有其他因素在推动二手电动汽车销量提升。
articles.summary_original: The most recent electric vehicle sales data provided a grim picture — at least for new EVs. Used EVs are moving in the opposite direction.

articles.title: 联合国秘书长发言人对美方威胁空袭伊朗民用基础设施表震惊 - 新华网
articles.summary: 联合国秘书长发言人就美方公开威胁空袭伊朗民用基础设施一事，表达了震惊态度。这则新闻由新华网发布，想要了解更多事件细节的公众，可以前往Google新闻平台查看该新闻的完整报道。

articles.title: 阿尔忒弥斯二号宇航员打破纪录 为一座陨石坑命名
articles.title_original: Artemis II astronauts break a record, name a crater
articles.summary: 美国东部时间周一下午近两点，阿尔忒弥斯二号任务机组人员打破阿波罗13号56年前创下的纪录，飞行至距地球超248655英里处，成为迄今为止离地球最远的人类，机组人员还借此契机举办仪式为一座陨石坑命名。
articles.summary_original: A few minutes before 2PM ET on Monday, the crew of Artemis II broke a record set 56 years ago by the ill-fated Apollo 13 mission - at over 248,655 miles, they have now traveled farther from Earth than any humans before them. They marked the occasion with a crater naming ceremony that left the […]

articles.title: 音乐节抗议后 坎耶·韦斯特入境英国资格正被审查
articles.title_original: Kanye West's right to enter UK under review after festival outcry
articles.summary: 说唱歌手坎耶·韦斯特原定今年7月在伦敦公开亮相，因其过往曾发表反犹主义言论引发巨大争议，在相关抗议声浪发酵后，英国方面目前正对坎耶·韦斯特的入境资格进行审查复核。
articles.summary_original: The rapper's appearance in London in July has caused controversy because of his past antisemitic comments.

articles.title: 当地消息称：以色列袭击及哈马斯与武装在加沙冲突已致10人死亡
articles.title_original: Ten killed in Israeli strikes and clashes between Hamas and militia in Gaza, local sources say
articles.summary: 据当地消息，以色列袭击以及哈马斯与武装组织在加沙发生的冲突已造成十人死亡。此次袭击据称发生在哈马斯安全人员与一支受以色列支持的武装于加沙马加齐难民营附近发生冲突之后，袭击目标为哈马斯安全人员。
articles.summary_original: The Israeli strikes reportedly targeted Hamas security personnel after they clashed with an Israeli-backed militia near Maghazi camp.

articles.title: 特朗普支持前英国政治助理史蒂夫·希尔顿竞选加州州长
articles.title_original: Trump endorses ex-UK political aide Steve Hilton for California governor
articles.summary: 美国前总统特朗普公开支持史蒂夫·希尔顿竞选加利福尼亚州州长。希尔顿曾担任英国前首相的政治顾问，还曾主持福克斯新闻节目，此次他将以共和党候选人身份参与州长选举。
articles.summary_original: Steve Hilton, who advised the former prime minster and hosted a Fox News show, is running as a Republican.

articles.title: 谷歌悄悄推出可离线使用的AI听写应用
articles.title_original: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
articles.summary: 科技巨头谷歌近日悄然推出一款可离线运行的AI听写应用，这款主打离线优先属性的新品采用Gemma AI模型开发，正式入局AI听写应用赛道，将与Wispr Flow等同类热门应用展开市场竞争。
articles.summary_original: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

articles.title: 谷歌悄悄推出可离线使用的AI听写应用
articles.title_original: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
articles.summary: 谷歌近日悄悄推出一款全新AI听写应用，该应用主打离线优先使用，采用Gemma AI模型开发，将对标市场上现有的Wispr Flow等同类语音听写产品，为有需求的用户提供全新的离线AI听写服务选择。
articles.summary_original: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

articles.title: 当前MacBook最佳优惠
articles.title_original: The best deals on MacBooks right now
articles.summary: 2026年，苹果在售的MacBook不仅搭载性能出色的M系列处理器，还加入了此前仅iPhone使用的A系列芯片。随着起售价599美元的MacBook Neo推出，苹果如今提供了比以往更多尺寸、更多价位的MacBook产品选择。
articles.summary_original: It’s 2026, and that means Apple sells MacBooks equipped with not just its capable M-series processors but A-series chips that were previously exclusive to the iPhone. With the MacBook Neo starting at $599, the company now offers a wider range of options with more sizes and price points than ever before, all of which run […]

articles.title: 伊朗最高领袖悼念伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队情报机构领导人 - 东方财富
articles.summary: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队情报机构领导人赛义德·马吉德·哈德米在美以发起的联合空袭中身亡，伊朗最高领袖、外交部长阿拉格齐分别发表悼词悼念。此次袭击还波及伊朗最大石化设施，伊朗高级官员称不会为暂时停火重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。

articles.title: 大疆Mic Mini可随行录制清晰音频 促销价仅60美元
articles.title_original: DJI’s Mic Mini records clear audio on the go, and it’s on sale for $60
articles.summary: 不少创作者经常在外拍摄TikTok、Instagram、YouTube等平台的内容，糟糕的音质会破坏优质视频体验。大疆Mic Mini无需携带笨重昂贵的设备，就能录制清晰稳定的视频音频，目前售价已降至历史最低价，仅售60美元。
articles.summary_original: If you regularly create content for TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube on the go, bad sound quality can easily take away from an otherwise great video. DJI’s Mic Mini helps you record clear, reliable sound for videos without carrying around bulky, expensive gear, and it’s currently down to its all-time low price. You can buy the […]

articles.title: 网飞推出全新独立应用 拓展儿童游戏业务
articles.title_original: Netflix is expanding into kids’ games with a new stand-alone app
articles.summary: 流媒体平台网飞正式切入儿童游戏领域，推出面向儿童的全新独立应用。该应用将向儿童开放一个规模持续增长的专属儿童游戏库，进一步丰富自身儿童线上娱乐产品布局。
articles.summary_original: Netflix says the app gives children access to an "ever-growing" library of games for kids.

articles.title: 为何安全监管机构终止特斯拉远程泊车功能调查
articles.title_original: Why safety regulators closed their investigation into Tesla’s remote parking feature
articles.summary: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）已终止对特斯拉远程泊车“智能召唤”功能的调查。该机构称仅极少数相关案例引发事故，且没有事故造成人员受伤，特斯拉也已针对该功能发布了多项软件更新。
articles.summary_original: The NHTSA closed its investigation into Tesla's "Actually Smart Summon" feature, saying that only a fraction of cases resulted in an incident and that no incidents resulted in injury. Tesla has also issued a number of software updates.

articles.title: 自动驾驶出租车公司拒披露远程操作员干预频率

articles.summary_original: Autonomous vehicle companies are refusing to disclose key details about their use of remote assistance teams, including how often these workers are forced to intervene to help their self-driving cars. Sen. Ed Markey (D-MA) had asked robotaxi companies to disclose the information as part of an investigation by his office into the use of remote […]

articles.title: “真切感受到关爱”——萨瓦娜·格思里重返NBC 寻母行动仍在继续

articles.summary_original: Nancy Guthrie disappeared from her home in Tucson, Arizona, in what authorities believe was an abduction.

articles.summary_original: Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

articles.title: 苹果就应用商店纠纷再次诉诸最高法院

articles.summary: 游戏开发商Epic Games与苹果就应用商店收费规则产生纠纷，此前法院作出裁决，限制苹果对平台内外部支付渠道收取佣金，苹果不服该裁决，目前计划请求最高法院对这一纠纷进行重新审查。
articles.summary_original: Apple plans to ask the Supreme Court to review its App Store fight with Epic Games, as it challenges a ruling limiting its ability to charge fees on external payments.

articles.title: NASA阿尔忒弥斯二号任务将绕飞月球背面

articles.summary_original: Humans haven’t stepped foot on the Moon since NASA’s Apollo 17 mission in 1972. Now, the space agency is racing to get back to the lunar surface under the umbrella of its Artemis program — a nod to the Greek goddess and twin sister of Apollo, whose name was given to NASA’s first program to […]

articles.title: 莱迪史密斯黑漫巴佐合唱团"智慧长老"去世 享年77岁
articles.title_original: Ladysmith Black Mambazo's 'wise elder' dies aged 77
articles.summary: 南非标志性合唱团体莱迪史密斯黑漫巴佐的核心成员阿尔伯特·马齐布科去世，享年77岁。马齐布科被称为该团的"智慧长老"，已在这支知名南非合唱团体中演唱超过55年。
articles.summary_original: Albert Mazibuko sang in the iconic South African choral group for more than 55 years.

articles.summary: 针对美伊停火相关提议，伊朗明确回应，拒绝美方提出的临时停火提议，强调需达成永久停战，已提出10项停战条款，表明坚持国防优先、拒绝胁迫谈判的立场。美国白宫称，特朗普尚未批准巴基斯坦提出的该停火方案，仅将其视作众多构想之一。

articles.title: 挖掘潜力 扩能提质——当前我国服务业发展综述 - 中国网新闻中心

articles.title: 朝鲜劫持一款网络常用开源项目 攻击谋划或已持续数周
articles.title_original: North Korea’s hijack of one of the web’s most used open source projects was likely weeks in the making

articles.summary_original: North Korean hackers pushed out malicious updates to a popular open source project by hacking a top developer's computer in a long-running campaign.

articles.title: 美国最高法院为撤销史蒂夫·班农定罪铺路
articles.title_original: US Supreme Court paves way for dismissal of Steve Bannon conviction
articles.summary: 美国最高法院近日作出裁定，为撤销曾担任美国前总统特朗普战略顾问史蒂夫·班农的定罪铺平道路。依据最高法院出具的相关命令，下级法院可就是否撤销针对班农的起诉进行审议。
articles.summary_original: The order allows a lower court to consider dismissing the former Trump strategist's indictment.

articles.title: 爱泼斯坦在巴黎：一名性犯罪者如何钻营接触法国精英

articles.summary: 性犯罪者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦在自由身的最后一段时光身处巴黎，期间会见了多位法国极具影响力的人物。这种钻营获取上层人脉的操作是他一以贯之的手法，他借此为自己肮脏的犯罪生涯披上了体面的外衣。
articles.summary_original: Jeffrey Epstein spent his last days of freedom in Paris, meeting with influential figures. It was a playbook he used everywhere he lived to stamp a veneer of respectability on a life of sordid criminality.

articles.title: OpenAI的人工智能经济愿景：公共财富基金、机器人税与四天工作制
articles.title_original: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day workweek
articles.summary: 当前政策制定者正围绕人工智能的经济影响展开辩论，OpenAI提出对AI利润征税、设立公共财富基金、扩大社会保障网等举措，应对人工智能可能引发的失业与不平等问题，这一方案将再分配机制与资本主义模式相结合。
articles.summary_original: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

articles.title: 阿尔忒弥斯二号航天员今日将创下距地球最远飞行新纪录
articles.title_original: The Artemis II astronauts will set a new distance record from Earth today
articles.summary: 1970年4月15日，阿波罗13号三名航天员创下距地球248655英里的最远飞行纪录。近56年后，阿尔忒弥斯二号乘组预计打破该纪录，其乘坐的猎户座飞船最远将达距地球252757英里，超出原纪录数千英里。
